heading: Tonight
text: A few localized evening showers ending overnight. Partly cloudy, with locally dense valley fog. Lows in the 50s to near 60. Light and variable wind.

heading: Sunday
text: Morning fog burning off to sunshine with mixed clouds and the chance of a stray shower. Highs in the 70s to low 80s north, in the low to mid 80s elsewhere. Light and variable wind.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Partly cloudy, with the chance for valley fog, some areas becoming locally dense. Lows in the 50s to near 60. Calm wind.
